work projects blog

Alex Rivera

Software Engineer

I am a software engineer, ui/ux designer, product planner, problem solver, mentor, forever student, minimalist, and eternal optimist.

I love to both build and break things. I am motivated by challenging projects with self-guided research and dynamic problem solving.

This is my personal space for writing, work, and small experiments. The site is powered by Astro content collections, so new posts are just Markdown files.

Work

See all work
  • Northwind Labs
    Software Engineer
    Feb2021 - Present

    I work on developer tooling and distributed systems, with a focus on making complex workflows easier to understand and operate.

  • Early Studio
    Frontend Engineer
    May2019 - Jan2021

    I built product interfaces, design systems, and internal tools for small teams moving quickly from idea to prototype.

Recent projects

See all projects
  • Trailmap
    An offline-first hiking companion with crowd-sourced trail conditions.
  • Lumen
    A tiny CLI that turns your shell history into a personal knowledge base.
  • FieldDeck
    Lightweight image labeling tool for small ML datasets.

Blog posts

See all posts
  • Shipping Faster With Smaller PRs
    How breaking work into tiny pull requests changed how my team ships.
  • Rust for Pythonistas
    A gentle on-ramp to Rust for folks who already love Python.
  • Designing With Tokens, Not Pixels
    Why token-driven design systems scale better than ad-hoc styling.
